$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C4 2026-07-17): the RUN witness for the TCL scalar/string/result surface (ClientData typedef + TCL_OK/TCL_ERROR/NULL PP-macros + Tcl_GetString + Tcl_WrongNumArgs). A registered C command reads a string arg + returns its length; libtcl parses `expr [len abc] + 39`, CALLS BACK into LenCmd (len abc -> 3), expr -> 42. The same test-command shape every sqlite src/test*.c uses. elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); the ubuntu x86_64 CI legs run it (libtcl8.6 installed), native-arm64 arch-gates, win/macos compile-only. RED-ON-DISABLE: revert tcl.json's elf `library` to libc.so.6 -> undefined symbol at load, exit 127.
